name: Has README
description: Repository includes a README file with project description and usage instructions.

name: Has LICENSE
description: Repository includes an open source license file defining usage terms.

name: Has Contributing Guide
description: Repository includes contribution guidelines for collaborators.

name: Has Tests
description: Repository includes a test directory or test files.

name: Has Security Policy
description: Repository includes a security disclosure policy.

name: Has Environment Documentation
description: Repository documents required environment variables with an example file.

name: Has Changelog
description: Repository maintains a changelog documenting notable changes.

name: Has Linting Configuration
description: Repository has code linting or formatting configuration for consistent code style.

name: Has Container Configuration
description: Repository includes Docker or container configuration for reproducible environments.

name: Has Dependency Lockfile
description: Repository includes a lockfile ensuring reproducible dependency installations.

name: Has Type Checking
description: Repository uses static type checking for improved code safety.
